top_tweets.text:
Since Opus 4.8 is out and more and more designers are getting into Design Engineering, I thought I’d share some of the interaction patterns I use most often:

Use proximity, not just hover. When the cursor gets close, nearby elements can subtly scale and darken based on distance. https://t.co/cbVKygYENs
top_tweets.author: gabriell_lab
top_tweets.name: Gabriel
top_tweets.summary_zh: 隨著 Opus 4.8 推出，越來越多設計師進入 Design Engineering 領域。作者分享常用的互動設計模式：利用「接近度」（proximity）而非僅靠 hover，當游標靠近時，附近元素會根據距離微妙地縮放和變暗。

top_tweets.text:
"Design vs code" is a false dichotomy.

What we're working towards at Figma: freeform design AND prototyping with code AND shipping to production

... all in one connected, collaborative and visual first platform.
top_tweets.author: zoink
top_tweets.name: Dylan Field
top_tweets.summary_zh: Figma 認為「設計 vs 程式碼」是錯誤的二分法，團隊正致力於整合自由設計、程式碼原型與產品上線，打造一個連貫、協作且視覺優先的平台。

top_tweets.text:
It’s never been easier to design your dream house.

Draw a shape. Define your rooms. Set your constraints.

@DraftedAI generates complete floor plans, elevations, and 3D home designs in seconds.

Over the last month, 120,000 people generated 325,000+ home designs with https://t.co/15UwGKE5G3
top_tweets.author: ycombinator
top_tweets.name: Y Combinator
top_tweets.summary_zh: DraftedAI 讓使用者畫出形狀、定義房間與限制條件後，即可在幾秒內生成完整的平面圖、立面圖與 3D 住宅設計。過去一個月已有 12 萬人生成超過 32.5 萬套設計。

top_tweets.text:
iOS 27 is literally what iOS 26 should have been

No more cluttered menus or messy tool placements

Everything looks more refined, cohesive and premium now https://t.co/32i0DaM3Mc
top_tweets.author: TheAppleDesign
top_tweets.name: Apple Design
top_tweets.summary_zh: iOS 27 修正了前一版的混亂選單與工具配置問題，整體介面變得更精緻、一致且具質感。

top_tweets.text: Structure the motion, then let the design bloom. https://t.co/usOifkgW9P
top_tweets.author: fznutri
top_tweets.name: FZNUTRI
top_tweets.summary_zh: 先建構動態結構，再讓設計自然綻放。

top_tweets.text: Opus 4.8 is a new frontier model at mechanical CAD design https://t.co/RFHcQG4zVF
top_tweets.author: adamdotnew
top_tweets.name: adam
top_tweets.summary_zh: Opus 4.8 在機械 CAD 設計領域是一款新的前沿模型。

top_tweets.text: design i wanted out of my head #whitefox #marvelrivals https://t.co/LGTAV7GYgb
top_tweets.author: 24ozlatte
top_tweets.name: latte ☕︎
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者分享了自己想畫出來的 White Fox（Marvel Rivals）設計稿。

top_tweets.text: You are not a machine. You are more like a garden. You need different things on different days. A little sun today, a little less water tomorrow. You have fallow and fruitful seasons. It is not a design flaw. It is wiser than perpetual sameness.
top_tweets.author: OrevaZSN
top_tweets.name: 𐌁𐌉Ᏽ 𐌕𐌉𐌌𐌉
top_tweets.summary_zh: 你不是機器，而是花園——需要因應不同日子調整投入，有休耕也有豐收季，這不是設計缺陷，而是比永恆一致更有智慧的運作方式。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: PromptLayer
top_products.author: Sam Benson
top_products.tagline: Trace AI requests, workflows, and costs in one timeline
top_products.summary_zh: 在單一時間軸中追蹤 AI 請求、工作流程與成本支出，提供完整的 AI 使用監控與分析。

top_products.title: Drafted
top_products.author: Garry Tan
top_products.tagline: Design a home instantly with AI
top_products.summary_zh: 使用 AI 技術快速生成住宅設計方案，適合需要即時視覺化居家規劃的使用者。

top_products.title: TrackNotch
top_products.author: Manoj Achari
top_products.tagline: LLM usage tracking that lives in your Mac's notch
top_products.summary_zh: 將 LLM 使用追蹤功能整合至 Mac 螢幕瀏海區域，方便開發者即時監控 API 用量。

top_products.title: Agent A by Ahrefs
top_products.author: Ankit Sharma
top_products.tagline: The AI Marketing Agent Powered by Ahrefs Data
top_products.summary_zh: 基於 Ahrefs 數據驅動的 AI 行銷代理工具，協助行銷人員進行數據分析與策略規劃。

top_products.title: Coffee Piano
top_products.author: Jaime
top_products.tagline: Browser music and piano studio with visual harmony tools
top_products.summary_zh: 瀏覽器內的音樂創作與鋼琴工作室，提供視覺化和聲工具輔助音樂製作。

top_products.title: Notchy
top_products.author: Vishva Variya
top_products.tagline: Mac dynamic island with music, timers, clipboard, file drops
top_products.summary_zh: 為 Mac 動態島區域提供音樂控制、計時器、剪貼簿與檔案拖放等快捷功能。
